'''mozazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:iamatological|iamatological]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-z-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iamatological|iamatological]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mozazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mozazhithi|mozazhithi]] || [[word:mozazhiji|mozazhiji]] || [[word:mozazhishi|mozazhishi]] || [[word:mozazhiki|mozazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mozazhuthuthu|mozazhuthuthu]] || [[word:mozazhujuju|mozazhujuju]] || [[word:mozazhushushu|mozazhushushu]] || [[word:mozazhukuku|mozazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mozazhuthu|mozazhuthu]] || [[word:mozazhuju|mozazhuju]] || [[word:mozazhushu|mozazhushu]] || [[word:mozazhuku|mozazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mozazhufthuf|mozazhufthuf]] || [[word:mozazhufjuf|mozazhufjuf]] || [[word:mozazhufshuf|mozazhufshuf]] || [[word:mozazhufkuf|mozazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mozazhethe|mozazhethe]] || [[word:mozazheje|mozazheje]] || [[word:mozazheshe|mozazheshe]] || [[word:mozazheke|mozazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mozazhothotho|mozazhothotho]] || [[word:mozazhojojo|mozazhojojo]] || [[word:mozazhoshosho|mozazhoshosho]] || [[word:mozazhokoko|mozazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mozazhotho|mozazhotho]] || [[word:mozazhojo|mozazhojo]] || [[word:mozazhosho|mozazhosho]] || [[word:mozazhoko|mozazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mozazhofthof|mozazhofthof]] || [[word:mozazhofjof|mozazhofjof]] || [[word:mozazhofshof|mozazhofshof]] || [[word:mozazhofkof|mozazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mozazhïfthïf|mozazhïfthïf]] || [[word:mozazhïfjïf|mozazhïfjïf]] || [[word:mozazhïfshïf|mozazhïfshïf]] || [[word:mozazhïfkïf|mozazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mozazhïfthïfthïf|mozazhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:mozazhïfjïfjïf|mozazhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:mozazhïfshïfshïf|mozazhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:mozazhïfkïfkïf|mozazhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mozazhïfthïf|mozazhïfthïf]] || [[word:mozazhïfjïf|mozazhïfjïf]] || [[word:mozazhïfshïf|mozazhïfshïf]] || [[word:mozazhïfkïf|mozazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mozazhïfthïf|mozazhïfthïf]] || [[word:mozazhïfjïf|mozazhïfjïf]] || [[word:mozazhïfshïf|mozazhïfshïf]] || [[word:mozazhïfkïf|mozazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mozazhæthæ|mozazhæthæ]] || [[word:mozazhæjæ|mozazhæjæ]] || [[word:mozazhæshæ|mozazhæshæ]] || [[word:mozazhækæ|mozazhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mozazhathatha|mozazhathatha]] || [[word:mozazhajaja|mozazhajaja]] || [[word:mozazhashasha|mozazhashasha]] || [[word:mozazhakaka|mozazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mozazhatha|mozazhatha]] || [[word:mozazhaja|mozazhaja]] || [[word:mozazhasha|mozazhasha]] || [[word:mozazhaka|mozazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mozazhafthaf|mozazhafthaf]] || [[word:mozazhafjaf|mozazhafjaf]] || [[word:mozazhafshaf|mozazhafshaf]] || [[word:mozazhafkaf|mozazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mozazhasha|mozazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mozazhshësha|mozazhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mozazhrosha|mozazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mozazhmusha|mozazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mozazhyasha|mozazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomozazhnkshësha|gomozazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomozazhnkrosha|gomozazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomozazhnkmusha|gomozazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomozazhnkyasha|gomozazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mozazazhasha|mozazazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mozazazhshësha|mozazazhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mozazazhrosha|mozazazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mozazazhmusha|mozazazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mozazazhyasha|mozazazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomozazazhnkshësha|gomozazazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomozazazhnkrosha|gomozazazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomozazazhnkmusha|gomozazazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomozazazhnkyasha|gomozazazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mezæzhasha|mezæzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mezæzhshësha|mezæzhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mezæzhrosha|mezæzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mezæzhmusha|mezæzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mezæzhyasha|mezæzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomezæzhnkshësha|gomezæzhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomezæzhnkrosha|gomezæzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomezæzhnkmusha|gomezæzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomezæzhnkyasha|gomezæzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mozfazhasha|mozfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mozfazhshësha|mozfazhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mozfazhrosha|mozfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mozfazhmusha|mozfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mozfazhyasha|mozfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomozfazhnkshësha|gomozfazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomozfazhnkrosha|gomozfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomozfazhnkmusha|gomozfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomozfazhnkyasha|gomozfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
